title: humata corniculata
intro: Humata corniculata, also known as Chinese leak or water spinach, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Urticaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antihypertensive effects. The health benefits of Humata corniculata include reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of arthritis, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be consumed raw in salads or cooked as a vegetable.
